primary_text:
If your beef travelled 2,400km and sat in cold storage for weeks, is it really fresh?

That's the industry average. Farms to processors to distribution centres to shelves. The farmer's name disappears along the way.

FarmThru works differently. Named regenerative farms across NSW ship direct to the Brookvale hub. You collect it the same week it left the farm.

100% grass-fed. No hormones. No feedlots. You know where it came from.

Same week, not same month.
headline: If it's been in cold storage for weeks
description: Supermarket beef: weeks old, 2,400km journey. FarmThru: same week, named farms.
creative_brief: Animated map: long red supply chain route vs short green farm-to-hub line. Clean data-viz style. Warm palette, not aggressive.
